exercises.title: Basic Practice
exercises.description: Type these words: flask lad salad fall lass daffodil flash dash

solution.code: flask lad salad fall lass daffodil flash dash

exercises.title: Sentence Practice
exercises.description: Type each sentence without looking at the keyboard.

solution.code:
A flask had a lad of salad.
Flash had a sad lass.
Dash falls all.
